commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix PR_REVIEW phase skip and add standalone pr-review command

The resume command dispatched PR_CREATED directly to DOCUMENT, skipping
the chunked PR review phase entirely. The phase transition guard also
allowed PR_CREATED→DOCUMENT_IN_PROGRESS as a legal shortcut.

Fixes:
- resume.md: PR_CREATED now dispatches to PR_REVIEW (step 14)
- resume.md: added missing PR_REVIEW, PR_REVIEW_FIXING, MERGE_GATE_WAITING entries
- phase-transition-guard.sh: removed PR_CREATED>DOCUMENT_IN_PROGRESS shortcut
- new pr-review.md command for standalone PR review outside the state machine

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add design.md, overhaul architecture.md, drop ai_primer.md

design.md (new):
- Four core mental models: Packer/Git split, Git as truth, systemd owns
  lifecycle, two-phase service pattern
- Key tradeoffs table (Git saves, destroy-on-idle, Wine, .in templates)
- Gotchas for new contributors (stash strategy, warm SteamCMD, Wine prefix
  at build time, Type=simple readiness, Wine 11 wine64 removal)

architecture.md:
- Remove stale metadata startup/shutdown script references (removed in #11)
- Fix boot sequence intro: no metadata, game-startup via WantedBy=
- Fix xvfb-startup: 16-bit -> 24-bit, add ExecStartPost= readiness note
- Fix wine64 -> wine (Wine 11)
- Fix ServerHostSettings.json -> ServerHostSettings.json.in in Secrets
- Add stash-is-intentional note to VRising shutdown sequence
- Add Wine/Xvfb build-time initialisation section
- Add Known Build Noise table (expected warnings vs real failures)

CLAUDE.md: add docs/design.md reference
docs/ai_primer.md: deleted (superseded by design.md)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add transparent auto-login for ZUEB authenticated commands

When a session is missing or a token expires mid-flight, the system
now automatically re-authenticates using ZUEB_USERNAME / ZUEB_PASSWORD
from the environment, making nightly scheduler and other unattended
flows resilient to token expiry without user intervention.

- Add _auto_login / _ensure_session / _is_sso_error / _run_with_relogin
  helpers to bot/agent/helper.py
- Refactor schedule, attendance, attendance-punch to use the new helpers
  (L2: auto-login on missing session; L3: retry once on SSO failure)
- Make login command args optional with env-var fallback
- /login handler in commands.py supports no-arg env-var login;
  message deletion skipped when no password was in the message
- Update system prompt rule 4: agent goes directly to skills instead
  of prompting for /login first
- zueb-login SKILL.md: add no-arg call pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dashboard: phased execution plan + war dashboard

- Added WAR DASHBOARD panel showing market conditions (Oil, VIX, S&P futures)
- Added EXECUTION PLAN section with Phase 1 (Monday) and Phase 2 (Wednesday) trades
- Added Variant Perceptions table showing our edge vs market consensus
- Added Portfolio Composition breakdown by category (Core, Screen Alpha, Macro, Short, Cash)
- Updated positions.json with full 13-position war scenario portfolio
- Updated API to load execution_plan_march10.json and pass to template
- Added three-source price validation (FMP + Finnhub + Polygon)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: config.Save drops providers and other fields on write

Save() manually listed each field via viper.Set, so any field not
explicitly included was silently stripped when forge.yaml was rewritten
(e.g. by `anvil add/remove`). Replace the brittle field-by-field
approach with yaml.Marshal using struct tags — new fields can never be
dropped again.

Adds a Save→Load round-trip test to prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Remotion best practices skills package

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Thread pool, AVX-512 SiLU, transposed conv1d weights (~68ms/tok, 14.7 tok/s)

- Replace per-layer std::thread creation with persistent futex-based WorkerPool
  (3 workers + main thread). Eliminates 72 thread creations/joins per token.
  Deltanet time: 4.4ms → 1.6ms.
- Vectorize SiLU with AVX-512 in conv1d and gated RMSNorm (Schraudolph's exp).
- Pre-transpose conv1d weights from [channels, 4] to [4, channels] at load time
  for contiguous AVX-512 loads instead of gather instructions.
  Conv1d time: 0.9ms → 0.4ms.
- Parallel TP reduction reads from both chips using background thread.

Host compute: 5ms → 2ms per token. Overall: ~71ms → ~68ms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add GitHub Actions auto deploy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: deep audit — 16 bug fixes across dashboard, demo chatbot, and Telegram bot

Dashboard (12 fixes):
- Add AbortController with 15s timeout to all fetch calls (load/save/delete/move)
- Fix race condition on rapid month navigation via controller cancellation
- Standardize ID resolution with getBookingId() helper (5 call sites)
- Fix goToday() timing — use _pendingSelectDate instead of hardcoded 500ms setTimeout
- Fix null fields not applied in saveBookingEdit (cleared fields now patched)
- Skip auto-refresh when modal/dialog is open to prevent stale data conflicts
- Fix _rerenderCurrentDay flicker (10ms → 280ms close animation buffer)
- Add 'Paid' to PAYMENT_LT and PAYMENT_CLASS maps for backward compat
- Add last_week_revenue to demo stats data

Demo chatbot (4 fixes):
- Fix trampoline field mismatch: support both trampoline_preference and trampoline
- Fix esc() JSON escaping — proper backslash escapes instead of replacing " with '
- Narrow mock fetch interceptor to exact webhook URL (prevent intercepting other POSTs)
- Persist booking dedup hash to sessionStorage (survives re-render)

Telegram bot (4 fixes):
- Standardize payment_status to 'Paid in Full' (was 'Paid')
- Add shouldSend flag to prevent empty Telegram API calls
- Strip markdown code fences from LLM JSON responses before parsing
- Handle both 'Paid' and 'Paid in Full' in payIcon display

All 112 Playwright tests pass (54 core + 58 features).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix missing package data: include overlay.toml and schemas.json in wheel

overlay.toml and schemas.json were not shipped in the PyPI wheel because
pyproject.toml lacked [tool.setuptools.package-data]. This caused
FileNotFoundError at import time when wirefilter was installed, breaking
octorules lint in CI.

commit.message:
Fix stats: qualified count now filters by is_qualified, show total_in_db

qualified_in_db was counting all available listings in price range without
checking is_qualified=True, making it exceed total_scraped. Now correctly
filters and compares against total_in_db instead of last scrape's total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(site): use generic constraint instead of union for localized() params

The `Record<string, unknown> | object` union from the previous fix still
fails in CI — TypeScript resolves against Record<string, unknown> first
and rejects typed interfaces lacking an index signature. Using
`<T extends object>` accepts any object type cleanly.

commit.message:
Fix OG image fonts, Docker prod build, map UX, variable fonts, auto light/dark theme

- OG image: use correct design system fonts (Space Mono for prices, Outfit
  for labels), add Google Fonts @import, fix wordmark overlap with tspan
- Docker: multi-stage frontend build with nginx, reverse proxy for /api,
  per-service .dockerignore, remove dev server from production
- Map: fix z-index bleed through sticky header, re-enable scroll wheel zoom
- Fonts: switch Google Fonts import to variable ranges (Syne, Outfit)
- Theme: add automatic light/dark mode via prefers-color-scheme using CSS
  custom properties, theme-aware map tiles and marker icons
- Docs: update README with separate dev and production instructions

commit.message:
fix: update API endpoints and make base URL configurable

- Replace /api/me/subscription-price with /api/agents/:id/subscription-price (get-price)
- Replace PUT /api/me/subscription-price with PATCH /api/agents/:id/settings (set-price)
- Replace /api/agentTokens/ with /api/agent-tokens/ (token-info, burn-stats)
- Make BASE_URL configurable via DGCLAW_BASE_URL env var
- Update get-price and set-price to require agentId parameter
- Update docs (README, SKILL.md, api.md) to match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

GitHub Actions release workflow with GoReleaser (Forge-a34) (#141)

* feat: add release-forge.ps1 for tagging and publishing releases (#138)

Automates the release workflow:
1. Validates semver version argument
2. Ensures clean working tree on main branch
3. Runs forge changelog assemble and removes consumed fragments
4. Commits changelog, creates annotated tag, pushes to origin
5. Prints link to GitHub Actions release workflow
6. Optionally opens the Actions page (-Open flag)

Bead: Forge-eoy

Co-authored-by: Robin Smith <Robin.Edvard.Smith@fhi.no>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add PowerShell install script for one-line Forge installation (#139)

install.ps1 can be run via `irm .../install.ps1 | iex` to download and
install the latest Forge release from GitHub. Supports OS/arch detection,
checksum verification, PATH management, version pinning, and in-place
updates.

Bead: Forge-hu6

Co-authored-by: Robin Smith <Robin.Edvard.Smith@fhi.no>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review comments for Forge-a34

- Use RuntimeInformation for OS detection instead of $IsLinux/$IsMacOS
  (compatible with Windows PowerShell 5.1 under StrictMode)
- Escape asset name as regex and handle multiple/zero checksum matches
- Add chmod +x after install on non-Windows platforms
- Check remote tags via git ls-remote before creating release tag
- Use go run ./cmd/forge instead of PATH-dependent forge binary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Clone source repos to /tmp to avoid Go module conflicts

Cloning bare-metal-manager-core and bare-metal-manager-rest inside
the workspace caused controller-gen to scan their Go packages and
fail on unresolved dependencies. Clone to /tmp/carbide/ instead.

commit.message:
Set has_pending_reviews on PR creation instead of waiting for bellows poll (Forge-6ug) (#140)

* fix: set has_pending_reviews on PR creation instead of waiting for bellows poll

After inserting a new PR into the state DB, immediately call CheckStatus to
fetch review requests from GitHub and update has_pending_reviews. This closes
the race window where a PR with pending review requests (e.g. Copilot
auto-review) briefly appears in the Ready to Merge panel.

Bead: Forge-6ug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review comments for Forge-6ug

- Extract MergeabilityFromStatus helper for testable PRStatus → DB input conversion
- Add CheckStatusLight that skips expensive GraphQL thread pagination
- Handle InsertPR error and guard on dbPR.ID != 0 before updating mergeability
- Log warnings on CheckStatusLight and UpdatePRMergeability failures
- Add unit tests for MergeabilityFromStatus

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------
